summary: The SwingRatings algorithm indicates that UPS is currently testing its Daily 200MA support zone near $94.82. Based on historical price action, bounces from this level have yielded a win rate of 40.0%. The asset has recently tested this support 1 time(s), which may have partially consumed buy-side liquidity. In the event of a successful bounce, traders should monitor overhead supply, particularly a primary horizontal resistance at $100.45 and a significant trendline confluence around $99.74 (formed by 3 points). This setup presents a structured risk-reward profile for swing positioning.
